name: bookmarks
description: Save, search, and manage bookmarked links
author: CupBots
intent: Save, search, or manage bookmarked URLs and links

marketplace.tagline: Save, search, and tag links without leaving the chat
marketplace.long_description: Never lose a useful link again. Save bookmarks with auto-fetched titles, organize them with hashtags, and search your collection instantly. Perfect for teams that share resources across WhatsApp conversations.
